description_long: This is a whimsical, pink fairytale-style house resembling a small castle, complete with a central tower, battlements, and a flag at the top. The structure features multiple arched windows with purple accents and a large, arched double-door entryway at the front. The house is set on a green base that simulates grass, with illustrated elements such as a river, trees, a horse, and human figures, evoking a storybook scene. The roof sections are pitched and tiled, with the central tower rising above the rest of the building. Decorative stonework is depicted at the base of the walls, and the overall design is playful and cartoonish, likely intended for children. The asset is constructed from lightweight, flat materials, giving it a pop-up or model-like appearance.
description: A pink, fairytale castle-style house with a central tower, battlements, arched windows, and a decorative entryway, set on a grassy illustrated base with playful storybook elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched double-door entry, central tower with flag, and two human figures with a horse and tree on the grassy base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the left wing, battlements, and a horse figure, with the river and tree visible on the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, multiple arched windows, and the central tower, with less decorative detail and no entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right wing, a tree, river, and a human figure, with the central tower and flag visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Large arched double-door with decorative trim, no steps, and a central placement beneath the main tower.
